title: VideoNarrator
intent: Repurpose long-form video into clips, summaries, chapters, and social derivatives
requirements: ingestion module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
transcription module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
chaptering module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
clip-generation module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
social-variants module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
performance module fully implemented with backend, frontend, tests
constraints: No user feedback loops; autonomous operation only
No TODO/stub placeholders in production paths
acceptance_criteria: All listed modules available in UI + API
